creator: rob@debank.tv
text:
The audio/chromaprint 'fpcalc' utility dumps core on execution, I can reproduce this for .mp3 and .m4a (ALAC) files, no other formats tested.

Here is the last part of a truss on the process:

access("/usr/local/lib/liborc-0.4.so.0",0)       = 0 (0x0)
open("/usr/local/lib/liborc-0.4.so.0",O_RDONLY,040332740) = 3 (0x3)
fstat(3,{ mode=-rwxr-xr-x ,inode=1825312,size=533348,blksize=131072 }) = 0 (0x0)
mmap(0x0,4096,PROT_READ,MAP_PRIVATE|0x40000,3,0x0) = 34366169088 (0x800622000)
mmap(0x0,2613248,PROT_NONE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON|MAP_NOCORE,-1,0x0) = 34436112384 (0x8048d6000)
mmap(0x8048d6000,491520,PROT_READ|PROT_EXEC,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|MAP_NOCORE|0x40000,3,0x0) = 34436112384 (0x8048d6000)
mmap(0x804b4e000,24576,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|0x40000,3,0x78000) = 34438701056 (0x804b4e000)
munmap(0x800622000,4096)                         = 0 (0x0)
close(3)                                         = 0 (0x0)
access("/lib/libsupc++.so.1",0)                  ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
access("/usr/lib/libsupc++.so.1",0)              = 0 (0x0)
open("/usr/lib/libsupc++.so.1",O_RDONLY,040332740) = 3 (0x3)
fstat(3,{ mode=-r--r--r-- ,inode=8594883,size=89440,blksize=89600 }) = 0 (0x0)
mmap(0x0,4096,PROT_READ,MAP_PRIVATE|0x40000,3,0x0) = 34366169088 (0x800622000)
mmap(0x0,2248704,PROT_NONE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON|MAP_NOCORE,-1,0x0) = 34438725632 (0x804b54000)
mmap(0x804b54000,81920,PROT_READ|PROT_EXEC,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|MAP_NOCORE|0x40000,3,0x0) = 34438725632 (0x804b54000)
mmap(0x804d67000,8192,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|0x40000,3,0x13000) = 34440900608 (0x804d67000)
mmap(0x804d69000,65536,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_FIXED|MAP_ANON,-1,0x0) = 34440908800 (0x804d69000)
munmap(0x800622000,4096)                         = 0 (0x0)
close(3)                                         = 0 (0x0)
mmap(0x0,40960,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON,-1,0x0) = 34366210048 (0x80062c000)
munmap(0x80062f000,28672)                        = 0 (0x0)
mmap(0x0,102400,PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE,MAP_PRIVATE|MAP_ANON,-1,0x0) = 34366222336 (0x80062f000)
SIGNAL 11 (SIGSEGV)
process exit, rval = 0

Fix: 

None
How-To-Repeat: Run fpcalc on a .mp3 or .m4a file
